metadata.name: fogo_ntt_relayer
metadata.description: Cross-chain Wormhole NTT relayer with stateless PDA custody

docs: Cross-chain relayer for a configured base/asset token pair over Wormhole
NTT. User-facing flows are permissionless; governance is config-gated.

instructions.name: accept_admin
docs: The pending admin claims the global admin role (step 2).

instructions.name: accept_authority
docs: Two-step rotation, step 2. Signer must equal `pending_authority`;
current authority does not sign (lets independent multisigs rotate
without atomic co-sign).

instructions.name: bootstrap
docs: One-time deploy bootstrap: create the global config + set the admin.

instructions.name: configure
docs: Authority-only. `None` args leave fields unchanged. Fee decreases
apply instantly; increases stage for `FEE_TIMELOCK_SLOTS` (~2 days)
then auto-promote on the next `configure` after the window.

accounts.name: fee_vault
docs: `None` leaves the stored vault unchanged.

instructions.name: initialize
docs: Create a pair's config PDA + relayer-owned ATAs. Admin-gated. NTT
program IDs are init-only safety pins.

accounts.name: global_config
docs: Admin gate: only `global_config.admin` may create pairs.

accounts.name: fee_vault
docs: Forbid `fee_vault == asset_ata` to prevent self-transfer no-ops
that would commingle user funds with fees.

instructions.name: receive
docs: Redeem an inbound NTT VAA and create the `Flow` receipt. Direction
selects the token side, NTT manager, and flow seed.

accounts.name: pair_config
docs: Pair-bound via an in-handler self-assert (only `recv_mint` is present
here, so the config PDA can't be seed-checked in the Accounts struct).

accounts.name: recv_mint
docs: The received token's mint. Pinned in-handler to the direction-selected
config mint (base for deposit, asset for withdraw).

accounts.name: recv_ata
docs: Sweep destination — long-lived relayer-authority ATA for recv_mint.

accounts.name: user_inbox_authority
docs: `[USER_INBOX_SEED, user_wallet, min_swap_out]`;
owns and signs sweeps from user_inbox_ata.

instructions.name: refund
docs: Permissionless timeout refund. For a stale `Received` flow, sends the
original token back to `flow.recipient` via NTT, then closes the flow.

instructions.name: send
docs: Route-agnostic outbound send. Routes on `flow.direction`: deposit
pushes asset out, withdraw pushes base out, each via NTT `transfer_lock`
+ atomic `release_wormhole_outbound`.
`transfer_lock_account_count` splits `remaining_accounts` between the
two NTT CPIs.

instructions.name: set_admin
docs: Propose a new global admin (step 1 of two-step rotation).

instructions.name: swap
docs: Permissionless, route-agnostic swap. Routes on `flow.direction`:
deposit swaps base→asset (fee from the asset output), withdraw swaps
asset→base (fee from the asset input).

accounts.name: relayer_authority
docs: and swap CPI. Reach bounded by the post-CPI ATA assertions.

accounts.name: fee_vault
docs: Fee destination — always denominated in the asset token.

accounts.name: swap_program
docs: delegation, not program identity.

accounts.name: swap_delegate
docs: `relayer_authority` as a sentinel for owner-signed routers.

errors.name: InvalidAccountSplit
errors.msg: remaining_accounts split point is out of range

errors.name: AuthorityNotInAccounts
errors.msg: Relayer authority PDA not present in forwarded CPI accounts

errors.name: ZeroFogoSender
errors.msg: Parsed fogo_sender is the zero address

errors.name: UnauthorizedAuthority
errors.msg: Caller is not the authority

errors.name: FlowStatusMismatch
errors.msg: Flow is not in the expected status for this operation

errors.name: BalanceUnderflow
errors.msg: Post-CPI balance is less than pre-CPI balance

errors.name: ZeroAmountFlow
errors.msg: Bridge or swap produced zero tokens

errors.name: FeeBpsTooHigh
errors.msg: Fee basis points exceed MAX_FEE_BPS

errors.name: FeeOverflow
errors.msg: Fee computation overflow

errors.name: MissingSessionAuthority
errors.msg: NTT session authority PDA not found in remaining_accounts

errors.name: InvalidTransceiverMessage
errors.msg: NTT ValidatedTransceiverMessage account is malformed or too short

errors.name: TransceiverMessageMismatch
errors.msg: ntt_transceiver_message does not match the account consumed by the NTT redeem CPI

errors.name: InboxItemMismatch
errors.msg: ntt_inbox_item does not match the account consumed by the NTT CPIs

errors.name: RecipientAtaMismatch
errors.msg: Destination token account does not match the ATA consumed by the NTT release CPI

errors.name: FeeVaultAliasesUserAta
errors.msg: fee_vault must not alias the relayer's asset ATA

errors.name: NoPendingAuthority
errors.msg: No pending authority — nothing to accept

errors.name: PendingAuthorityMismatch
errors.msg: Signer does not match relayer_config.pending_authority

errors.name: EmptyPendingFee
errors.msg: PendingFee bundle has no inner leg set — invariant violation

errors.name: WrongOriginChain
errors.msg: Inbound NTT message did not originate from the FOGO peer chain

errors.name: UserInboxAuthorityMismatch
errors.msg: user_inbox_ata's authority does not match the [user_inbox, user_wallet] PDA

errors.name: UnexpectedFogoSender
errors.msg:
NTT VAA's NttManagerMessage.sender is not the intent_transfer setter PDA — deposit must originate via \
         intent_transfer

errors.name: InvalidInboxItem
errors.msg: ntt_inbox_item account is missing, too short, or has the wrong discriminator

errors.name: InsufficientInboxBalance
errors.msg: user_inbox_ata balance is below the NTT-recorded inbox_item.amount — inbox was not credited as expected

errors.name: PendingAuthorityIsCurrent
errors.msg: Proposed pending_authority equals the current authority — self-rotate is rejected

errors.name: AtaAuthorityTampered
errors.msg: Relayer ATA authority/delegate/close_authority was mutated by the swap CPI

errors.name: InputConsumedMismatch
errors.msg: swap consumed an input amount different from the flow amount

errors.name: OutputBelowFloor
errors.msg: swap output fell below the user-signed min_swap_out floor

errors.name: SwapAccountNotAllowed
errors.msg: a swap account aliases relayer custody (fee_vault/config/flow or a relayer_authority-owned token account)

errors.name: RelayerAuthorityTampered
errors.msg: swap CPI drained, reassigned, or reallocated the relayer_authority PDA

errors.name: BadNttProgram
errors.msg: ntt_program / transceiver owner does not match the direction-selected NTT manager

errors.name: BadReceiveMint
errors.msg: recv_mint does not match the direction-selected config mint

errors.name: RefundTooEarly
errors.msg: refund attempted before received_slot + REFUND_TIMEOUT_SLOTS

errors.name: ZeroMinSwapOut
errors.msg: min_swap_out must be > 0 — a zero floor would leave the swap unprotected

errors.name: BadConfig
errors.msg: pair_config PDA does not match the pair-derived address

errors.name: ArithmeticOverflow
errors.msg: arithmetic overflow

errors.name: UnauthorizedAdmin
errors.msg: only the relayer admin may create pairs

errors.name: NoPendingAdmin
errors.msg: no pending admin to accept

errors.name: PendingAdminMismatch
errors.msg: signer does not match the pending admin

errors.name: PendingAdminIsCurrent
errors.msg: proposed admin equals the current admin

types.name: Flow
docs: One-shot receipt binding an inbound bridge message to a FOGO wallet.
Replay protection lives in the per-VAA NTT claim account. Field set
is byte-stable — older PDAs must keep deserializing.

fields.name: recipient
docs: Originator on FOGO; outbound recipient on the return leg. Both legs are
SVM, so this is a pubkey; the NTT wire ABI takes its raw bytes.

fields.name: direction
docs: `Direction::Deposit` or `Direction::Withdraw`. Persisted at receive,
read by `swap`/`send` to select fee side and NTT manager.

fields.name: min_swap_out
docs: User-signed swap floor (output-token atomic units), bound via the
min-bearing inbox PDA. `swap` enforces `out_received >= min_swap_out`.

fields.name: received_slot
docs: `Clock::slot` at receive; `refund` timeout anchor.

types.name: GlobalConfig
docs: Global singleton (PDA `[GlobalConfig::SEED]`).

fields.name: pending_admin
docs: Two-step rotation target: `set_admin` proposes, `accept_admin` promotes.

types.name: PairConfig
docs: Config for one token pair (PDA `[PairConfig::SEED, base_mint, asset_mint]`).
`authority` only gates governance; user flows are permissionless.

fields.name: intent_programs
docs: Programs allowed to originate inbound VAAs. `receive` derives each
entry's setter PDA and matches the VAA sender; both slots are equally
authoritative (no primary/fallback), changeable only by a fresh init.

fields.name: reserved
docs: Headroom for future fixed-size fields without another migration.

fields.name: pending_authority
docs: Promoted to `authority` by `accept_authority` (two-step handoff).

fields.name: pending_fee
docs: Staged fee *increase*, auto-promoted on next `configure` once
`ready_slot` elapses. Decreases bypass this.

fields.name: ready_slot
docs: MAX-extended on later raises so a follow-up never shortens the window.
